madness_rt_0: 1) Amnesia: The investigator forgets everything since the last safe place.
madness_rt_1: 2) Psychosomatic Disability: Psychological blindness, deafness, or limb loss.
madness_rt_2: 3) Violence: The investigator attacks friends and foes indiscriminately.
madness_rt_3: 4) Paranoia: The investigator believes everyone is plotting against them.
madness_rt_4: 5) Significant Person: The investigator mistakes someone present for their Significant Person.
madness_rt_6: 7) Flee in Panic: The investigator flees by any means, even abandoning others.
madness_rt_7: 8) Physical Hysterics / Emotional Outburst: Uncontrolled laughter, crying, or screaming.
madness_rt_8: 9) Phobia: The investigator gains a new phobia (roll or choose on the phobia table).
madness_rt_9: 10) Mania: The investigator gains a new mania (roll or choose on the mania table).
